title: brickellia worthingtonii
intro: Brickellia worthingtonii, also known as Worthington's brickellia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Brickellia worthingtonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its herbal remedies, and can also be used in topical applications due to its antiseptic properties.
